scope: Independent structural, arithmetic, and outward-interval checker for Stage B v1 Donaldson coefficient formulas

checks.name: artifact_name
checks.detail: artifact id matches

checks.name: status_candidate
checks.detail: top-level status remains candidate

checks.name: all_pass_true
checks.detail: top-level all_pass is true

checks.name: type_gate_source
checks.detail: coefficient JSON points to the canonical type gate

checks.name: type_gate_all_pass
checks.detail: coefficient JSON records type gate all_pass

checks.name: type_gate_refuses_false
checks.detail: producer gate refusal is declared

checks.name: type_gate_check_count_matches
checks.detail: coefficient JSON check count matches type-check certificate

checks.name: external_type_gate_passes
checks.detail: type-check certificate itself passes

checks.name: all_terms_present
checks.detail: all expected bigraded terms are present

checks.name: term_omega_bidegree
checks.detail: omega has bidegree [1, 2]

checks.name: term_omega_metadata
checks.detail: omega carries source/gauge/inverse fields

checks.name: term_lambda_bidegree
checks.detail: lambda has bidegree [3, 0]

checks.name: term_lambda_metadata
checks.detail: lambda carries source/gauge/inverse fields

checks.name: term_Theta_bidegree
checks.detail: Theta has bidegree [2, 2]

checks.name: term_Theta_metadata
checks.detail: Theta carries source/gauge/inverse fields

checks.name: term_mu_bidegree
checks.detail: mu has bidegree [0, 4]

checks.name: term_mu_metadata
checks.detail: mu carries source/gauge/inverse fields

checks.name: term_M_eps_bidegree
checks.detail: M_eps has bidegree [3, 2]

checks.name: term_M_eps_metadata
checks.detail: M_eps carries source/gauge/inverse fields

checks.name: all_edges_present
checks.detail: all expected operator edges are present

checks.name: E3_input_degree
checks.detail: F_H omega has bidegree Omega^{3,1}

checks.name: E3_output_degree
checks.detail: G_f returns lambda in Omega^{3,0}

checks.name: E3_inverse_degree
checks.detail: independent E3 inverse degree check

checks.name: E3_uses_G_f
checks.detail: E3 names the fibrewise inverse

checks.name: E5_input_degree
checks.detail: F_H mu has bidegree Omega^{2,3}

checks.name: E5_output_degree
checks.detail: G_f returns Theta in Omega^{2,2}

checks.name: E5_inverse_degree
checks.detail: independent E5 inverse degree check

checks.name: E5_uses_G_f
checks.detail: E5 names the fibrewise inverse

checks.name: connection_input_degree
checks.detail: d_H omega has bidegree Omega^{2,2}

checks.name: connection_no_inverse
checks.detail: connection-choice edge has no hidden inverse

checks.name: E6_input_degree
checks.detail: d_H Theta has bidegree Omega^{3,2}

checks.name: E6_output_degree
checks.detail: E6 projects to M_eps bidegree

outward_interval_recomputation.method: Independent exact Fraction recomputation of all Stage B v1 formulas, followed by decimal floor/ceiling serialization. R_threshold is bracketed by integer bisection on the cube.
